{{Quote|My detachment of stormtroopers is relieving the Thirty-seventh Detachment that has been stationed at Mos Eisley on Tatooine.|Zeta Squadron's [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mod Terrik]], on his unit's assignment replacing the 37th Detachment|<ref name="Stormtrooper">{{StoryCite|story=When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
The '''37th Detachment''' was a unit of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]. The [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit was stationed in<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Stormtrooper" /> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date note">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of {{StoryCite|story=When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> another stormtrooper unit,<ref name="Stormtrooper" /> [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]], relieved the 37th Detachment at Mos Eisley.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The 37th Detachment was first mentioned in [[1995]]'s "[[When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale]]," written by [[Doug Beason]] as part of the [[1995]] anthology book ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''.<ref name="Stormtrooper" /> In [[2007]], the [[StarWars.com]] [[Visual Guides|Visual Guide]] "Chapter 7: Land of the Jawas" once more mentioned the unit, referring to them as the "37th Detachment."<ref name="VG">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/explore/visualguides/chp07.html|text=Episode IV Visual Guide — Chapter 7: Land of the Jawas}} {{C|[https://www.facebook.com/The-Visual-Guides-must-return-on-StarWarscom-195552901381/photos/a.440447036381/440448176381 image]}}</ref>
